query:
UPDATE platform_config SET configValue = 'true', updatedAt = NOW() WHERE configKey = 'TWILIO_TEST_MODE';

SELECT configKey, 
  CASE WHEN LENGTH(configValue) > 12 THEN CONCAT(LEFT(configValue,8),'...',RIGHT(configValue,4),' (',LENGTH(configValue),' chars)') ELSE configValue END as value,
  updatedAt
FROM platform_config 
WHERE configKey IN ('TWILIO_TEST_MODE','TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID','TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN','TWILIO_VERIFY_SERVICE_SID','TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER')
ORDER BY configKey;
command:

SELECT configKey, 
  CASE WHEN LENGTH(configValue) > 12 THEN CONCAT(LEFT(configValue,8),'...',RIGHT(configValue,4),' (',LENGTH(configValue),' chars)') ELSE configValue END as value,
  updatedAt
FROM platform_config 
WHERE configKey IN ('TWILIO_TEST_MODE','TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID','TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN','TWILIO_VERIFY_SERVICE_SID','TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER')
ORDER BY configKey;
